narrative:
Madison Twp township has 580 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.6 percentage points.
